zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wadham於1422年出生在英國戴文金斯布利其時，她的父親John Wadham29歲，母親Mrs- John Wadham25歲。她於大約1438年與Robert Stowell在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年之後在英國薩默塞特陶頓，埋葬在英國薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wadham was born in 1422, in Kingsbridge, Devon, England, her father, John Wadham, was 29 and her mother, Mrs- John Wadham, was 25. She married Robert Stowell about 1438, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1499, in Taunton, Somerset, England, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England.

Elle a épousé Robert Stowell environ 1438, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1499, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1438 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Robert Stowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1499 in Taunton, Somerset, England und wurde in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wadhamが1422年にイギリスデボンキングスブリッジで生まれた時，父John Wadhamは29歳，母Mrs- John Wadhamは25歳であった。約1438年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRobert Stowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年以後にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで死去し，イギリスソメルセトコスエルストーンスト ソマス オフ カンテルブリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wadham(이)가 1422년 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wadham(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs- John Wadham(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Robert Stowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 이후 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Stowell aproximadamente 1438, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1499, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothel: ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wadham родилась в 1422 г. в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wadham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs- John Wadham, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Stowell около 1438 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1499 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия и была похоронена в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия.
